contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Partner Poke Scheduler v0 — VERIFIED in production
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/129
  
  Details:
  First production run of the Stage 1 AI-first supply chain scheduler succeeded. v0 is now live and verified.
  
  ## What ran
  - clasp-pushed PartnerPokeDrafts.gs (~530 lines) + warmup_review_api.gs label extension to the live Apps Script project (14gKJ0VW49RsSn4S03pgxKXy0sp4Z7Z3Wm1Wj8jQiWW5dj1sFuPnp95sh). Used a fresh clasp clone in /tmp to sidestep the existing mirror's conflict state.
  - GROK_API_KEY + DRY_RUN script properties configured.
  - Dry run output verified: 5 candidates after filter+cap, sensible signal distribution.
  - DRY_RUN flipped, real run produced 5 Gmail drafts under 'AI/Partner Poke' label exactly as designed.
  
  ## The 5 drafts
  - 2 partner-addressed:
    - george@edgeandnode.com (Edge and Node) — restock check on cacao nibs
    - info@goaskalice.org (Go Ask Alice) — quick check on Agroverse cacao
  - 3 self-poke reminders (no email on file):
    - Prism Percussions (Corvallis OR) — dormant 4 months, suggested phone/in-person
    - SOHA (Philomath OR) — dormant 4 months, same shape
    - Founder Haus (Florianópolis) — running low (3 left), last via text May 12, suggested WhatsApp with Eric
  
  Founder Haus draft is the clearest validation of the operator-context pattern Gary specified — Grok-3 wove the last-successful-channel and contact name into the self-poke body correctly.
  
  ## Voice match
  Conversational, action-oriented, no auto-generated phrasing. Distinct register for partner-addressed ('Hey there, just wanted to touch base...') vs self-poke ('Hey Gary, remember to...').
  
  ## Two v0 quirks captured for v0.1 (non-blocking)
  1. networkRate=0 in logs — partners-velocity.json doesn't carry units_last_90_days/units_90d in the expected shape, so the dynamic re-poke cadence degenerates to the 3-day floor. Stock signals still surface correctly; cadence won't scale to fast-sellers until the velocity-JSON field name is verified.
  2. Founder Haus surfaced as self-poke even though Eric has email somewhere — contributor_contact_id join didn't resolve cleanly.
  
  ## Next milestones
  - Send/skip at least one draft to close the end-to-end loop.
  - ~1 week calibration period (manual runs, 1-2/day).
  - After calibration week, unblock the OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry for ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT.md bell-TODOs integration.
  - v0.1: daily cron trigger + two quirks fixed + auto Partner Check-in entry on send.
  
  PRs (this session segment):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/129 (v0 verified marker, merged)
  
  Stage 1 of the AI-first supply chain vision is now operational end-to-end. The bell surfaces what needs attention; the scheduler turns those signals into LLM-drafted Gmail drafts; human review is enforced architecturally (no GmailApp.send call anywhere).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
